title: Turkish-Style Bacon Stir Fry
description: A quick and savory stir fry dish made with crispy bacon and turkish spices. Serve with fluffy rice or noodles for a satisfying meal.
instructions: Cook the bacon in a large skillet over medium-high heat until crispy.
Remove the bacon from the skillet and set aside.
Add the floral oil to the skillet and sauté the fry until tender.
Add the turkish spices to the skillet and stir to combine.
Return the bacon to the skillet and stir to combine.
Serve the stir fry over fluffy rice or noodles.
Garnish with fresh herbs, if desired.
